billView.title: invoice
billView.invalidId: Iyo invoice ID haisiyo kana kuti haipo. Ita shuwa kuti chinongedzo chakarurama.
billView.loadError: Paita chikanganiso pakuisa invoice. Ita shuwa kuti wakabatana neserver kana edza zvakare gare gare.

errors.NOT_VERIFIED: Iyo account haina kuvhurwa. Ndokumbira uvhure email yako kutanga.
errors.EMAIL_SEND_FAILED: Meseji yekuvhura haina kutumirwa. Tapota tarisa email kero yako kana edza zvakare gare gare.
errors.ALREADY_VERIFIED: Iyo account yakatovhurwa. Iwe unogona ikozvino kupinda.
errors.INVALID_TOKEN: Link iyi haisiyo kana kuti yapera basa.
errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: Link yapera. Ndokumbirawo mukumbire chinongedzo chitsva.
errors.INSUFFICIENT_STOCK: Inventory isina kukwana kuti upedze kutengeserana.
errors.INVALID_CONTROLLER_COUNT: Nhamba yenhoo inofanira kuva pakati pe1 ne4.
errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Tatadza kubatana neserver. Ita shuwa kuti sevha iri kushanda uye kuti une internet yekubatanidza.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: Pane chakanganisa server. Ndapota edza zvakare gare gare.
